action.text: Set the required CODEC on the PABX configurator.
Initiate a communication between the set under evaluation in handset-mode and a distant set in handset mode.

expected.text: Every time you switch from one audio mode to another, pay attention to the audio quality during the transition phase: no unpleasant switching noise should be heard, no echo should be heard, and no distortion of the distant's voice should be heard on evaluation side and on distant side.

action.text: Switch from handset-mode to handsfree-mode.

expected.text: Every time you switch from one audio mode to another, pay attention to the audio quality during the transition phase: no unpleasant switching noise should be heard, no echo should be heard, and no distortion of the distant's voice should be heard on evaluation side and on distant side.

action.text: Switch from handsfree-mode to handset-mode.

expected.text: Every time you switch from one audio mode to another, pay attention to the audio quality during the transition phase: no unpleasant switching noise should be heard, no echo should be heard, and no distortion of the distant's voice should be heard on evaluation side and on distant side.

action.text: Switch from handset-mode to group-listening-mode.

expected.text: Every time you switch from one audio mode to another, pay attention to the audio quality during the transition phase: no unpleasant switching noise should be heard, no echo should be heard, and no distortion of the distant's voice should be heard on evaluation side and on distant side.

action.text: Switch from group-listening-mode to handsfree-mode.

expected.text: Every time you switch from one audio mode to another, pay attention to the audio quality during the transition phase: no unpleasant switching noise should be heard, no echo should be heard, and no distortion of the distant's voice should be heard on evaluation side and on distant side.

action.text: Switch from handsfree-mode to handset-mode.

expected.text: Every time you switch from one audio mode to another, pay attention to the audio quality during the transition phase: no unpleasant switching noise should be heard, no echo should be heard, and no distortion of the distant's voice should be heard on evaluation side and on distant side.

action.text: Loop 10 times from step 3 to step 7.
Change the volume level during the test.
Use a realistic time gap between two switchings.

expected.text: Every time you switch from one audio mode to another, pay attention to the audio quality during the transition phase: no unpleasant switching noise should be heard, no echo should be heard, and no distortion of the distant's voice should be heard on evaluation side and on distant side.
